peking-university.ch: 北京大学的前身是1898年创立的京师大学堂，1912年改为现名。1937年与清华大学、南开大学南迁长沙，共同组建国立长沙临时大学，1938年迁至昆明，改称国立西南联合大学；1946年迁回北平复学；2000年与原北京医科大学合并，组建成新的北京大学。北京大学为教育部直属高校，副部级建制，由教育部和北京市人民政府重点共建，是中国乃至亚洲最著名的高等学府之一。
peking-university.en: Peking University traces its origins to the Imperial University of Peking, founded in 1898, and adopted its current name in 1912. In 1937, it moved south to Changsha with Tsinghua University and Nankai University to form the National Changsha Temporary University; in 1938, it relocated to Kunming and became the National Southwestern Associated University. In 1946, it returned to Beiping and resumed operations, and in 2000 it merged with the former Beijing Medical University to form the new Peking University. Directly administered by the Ministry of Education and jointly supported by the Ministry of Education and the Beijing Municipal People's Government, Peking University is one of the most renowned institutions of higher learning in China and across Asia.

tsinghua-university.ch: 清华大学的前身清华学堂始建于1911年，1928年更名为国立清华大学。抗日战争全面爆发后南迁，与北京大学、南开大学组建为国立西南联合大学；1946年迁回清华园。1952年全国高等学校院系调整后，清华大学成为一所多科性工业大学，先后恢复或新建了理科、经济、管理和文科类学科，与中央工艺美术学院、原中国人民银行研究生部等合并。清华大学为教育部直属高校，是教育部与北京市人民政府、国家国防科技工业局、水利部、国家海洋局、国家卫生健康委员会共建的全国重点大学。
tsinghua-university.en: Tsinghua University originated as Tsinghua Xuetang in 1911 and was renamed National Tsinghua University in 1928. After the full-scale outbreak of the War of Resistance Against Japan, it moved south and joined Peking University and Nankai University to form the National Southwestern Associated University, before returning to the Tsinghua campus in 1946. Following the nationwide reorganization of higher education institutions in 1952, Tsinghua developed into a multidisciplinary industrial university, restoring or establishing programs in the sciences, economics, management, and the humanities, and later merging with institutions such as the Central Academy of Arts and Design and the former graduate school of the People's Bank of China. Directly under the Ministry of Education, Tsinghua is a national key university jointly supported by the Ministry of Education, the Beijing Municipal People's Government, the State Administration of Science, Technology and Industry for National Defense, the Ministry of Water Resources, the State Oceanic Administration, and the National Health Commission.

fudan-university.ch: 复旦大学起源于1905年创立的复旦公学，1917年定名为复旦大学并沿用至今。1937年复旦大学部分师生内迁重庆北培（渝校），1946年渝校迁回上海与沪校合并；2000年复旦大学与上海医科大学合并，组建为新的复旦大学。复旦大学为教育部直属高校，副部级建制，“九校联盟”（C9）成员，由教育部和上海市人民政府重点共建，是中国最著名的高等学府之一。
fudan-university.en: Fudan University traces its roots to Fudan Public School, founded in 1905, and officially adopted the name Fudan University in 1917, which it retains today. In 1937, part of its faculty and students relocated inland to Beibei, Chongqing, and in 1946 the Chongqing campus returned to Shanghai and merged with the original Shanghai campus. In 2000, Fudan merged with Shanghai Medical University to form the new Fudan University. Directly administered by the Ministry of Education, holding vice-ministerial status, and a member of the C9 League, Fudan is jointly supported by the Ministry of Education and the Shanghai Municipal People's Government and is one of China's most prestigious universities.

shanghai-jiao-tong-university.ch: 中国历史最悠久的大学，“综合性、创新型、国际化”的高等学府，拥有坚实的理科，强大的工科、生命医学学科，高水平、精品化的经济学、人文、法学和农学。在工、商、医三大领域拥有极高影响力，自然基金数连续11年全国第一，被誉为近20年发展最快的中国高校。软科世界一流学科前十排名内地高校第二。积极培育具有“梦想和激情、想象力和好奇心、系统知识体系和跨界思维及创新实践力，引领未来”的交大人！
shanghai-jiao-tong-university.en: One of the oldest universities in China, Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a comprehensive, innovation-driven, and internationalized institution. It has strong foundations in the sciences, outstanding strength in engineering and life and medical sciences, and high-level programs in economics, the humanities, law, and agriculture. The university enjoys exceptional influence in the fields of engineering, business, and medicine, has ranked first in China for the number of National Natural Science Foundation grants for eleven consecutive years, and is widely regarded as the fastest-developing Chinese university over the past two decades. In the ShanghaiRanking Global Ranking of Academic Subjects, it ranks second among mainland Chinese universities in the number of subjects placed in the global top ten. The university is committed to cultivating SJTU students with dreams and passion, imagination and curiosity, systematic knowledge, interdisciplinary thinking, and the practical capacity for innovation to lead the future.

zhejiang-university.ch: 浙江大学是一所历史悠久、声誉卓著的高等学府，坐落于中国历史文化名城、风景旅游胜地杭州。学校的前身求是书院创立于1897年，为中国人自己最早创办的新式高等学校之一。浙江大学学科涵盖哲学、经济学、法学、教育学、文学、历史学、艺术学、理学、工学、农学、医学、管理学等十二个门类。在国家公布的“双一流”建设名单中，学校入选一流大学建设高校（A类），18个学科入选一流建设学科，居全国高校第三。
zhejiang-university.en: Zhejiang University is a prestigious institution with a long history, located in Hangzhou, one of China's most celebrated historic and cultural cities and a renowned scenic destination. Its predecessor, Qiushi Academy, was founded in 1897 and was among the earliest modern higher education institutions established by Chinese people themselves. Zhejiang University offers disciplines across twelve broad fields, including philosophy, economics, law, education, literature, history, the arts, science, engineering, agriculture, medicine, and management. In China's national Double First-Class initiative, the university was selected as a Class A institution for world-class university development, with 18 disciplines chosen as world-class disciplines, ranking third nationwide.

xian-jiaotong-university.ch: 西安交通大学是国家教育部直属重点大学，为我国最早兴办的高等学府之一。其前身是1896年创建于上海的南洋公学，1921年改称交通大学，1956年内迁西安，1959年定名为西安交通大学。学校首批进入国家“211”和“985”工程建设，2017年入选一流大学A类建设高校。建校125年来，为国家培养了以200余位两院院士为代表的大批杰出人才。
xian-jiaotong-university.en: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a key university directly under the Ministry of Education and one of the earliest modern institutions of higher learning established in China. Its predecessor was Nanyang Public School, founded in Shanghai in 1896; it was renamed Jiaotong University in 1921, relocated to Xi'an in 1956, and formally took the name Xi'an Jiaotong University in 1959. The university was among the first institutions selected for both the national Project 211 and Project 985 initiatives, and in 2017 it was chosen as a Class A university under the Double First-Class initiative. Over its 125-year history, it has cultivated a large number of outstanding talents for the nation, including more than 200 members of the Chinese Academy of Sciences and the Chinese Academy of Engineering.

USTC.ch: 中国科学技术大学是“985工程”和“211工程”，A类世界一流大学建设高校，是一所以前沿科学和高新技术为主，兼有医学、特色管理和人文学科的综合性全国重点大学。中国科大是为“两弹一星”事业而创办的一所大学，她的创办被称为“我国教育史和科学史上的一项重大事件”。7个A+学科，数量居全国高校第五，“数理化天地生”六个基础学科全部被评为A或A+，全国高校唯一！26个本科专业获得国家级一流专业建设点认定。
USTC.en: The University of Science and Technology of China is a national key comprehensive university included in both Project 985 and Project 211, and is a Class A institution under China's Double First-Class initiative. It focuses primarily on frontier science and advanced technology, while also encompassing medicine, distinctive management programs, and the humanities. USTC was founded to serve the nation's "Two Bombs, One Satellite" program, and its establishment has been described as a landmark event in the history of Chinese education and science. It has seven A+ disciplines, the fifth-highest total among Chinese universities, and is the only university in the country whose six core foundational disciplines of mathematics, physics, chemistry, astronomy, earth science, and biology have all been rated A or A+. In addition, 26 undergraduate majors have been recognized as national first-class major construction sites.

harbin-institute-of-technology.ch: 哈尔滨工业大学的前身是创办于1920年的哈尔滨中俄工业学校，1938年正式定名为哈尔滨工业大学并沿用至今；2000年与哈尔滨建筑大学合并组建新的哈尔滨工业大学。哈尔滨工业大学是工业和信息化部直属高校，是工业和信息化部与教育部、黑龙江人民政府、国家海洋局共建的全国重点大学。
harbin-institute-of-technology.en: Harbin Institute of Technology traces its origins to the Harbin Sino-Russian School of Industry, founded in 1920. In 1938, it formally adopted the name Harbin Institute of Technology, which it retains today; in 2000, it merged with Harbin University of Architecture to form the new HIT. Directly administered by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, HIT is a national key university jointly supported by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, the Ministry of Education, the Heilongjiang Provincial People's Government, and the State Oceanic Administration.

nanjing-university.ch: 南京大学（Nanjing University）是直属于教育部的全国重点综合性、研究型大学，国家“双一流”A类建设高校，也是习近平总书记提出“扎根中国大地办世界一流大学”时给予厚望的5所中国顶尖高校之一，被李克强总理称赞为“在中国大学走在最前列”。
nanjing-university.en: Nanjing University is a national key comprehensive research university directly under the Ministry of Education and a Class A institution under China's Double First-Class initiative. It is also one of the five top Chinese universities singled out by President Xi Jinping when he called for building world-class universities rooted in Chinese soil, and it was praised by Premier Li Keqiang as being among the very forefront of Chinese higher education.
